query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) AS total_projects,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM awardedProjects) AS total_awarded,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drillingCampaigns) AS total_drilling,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) FROM projects) AS project_report_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) FROM awardedProjects) AS awarded_report_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) FROM drillingCampaigns) AS drilling_report_count
